MODULE: cosmos.integration.cli_bridge.capability_router
FILE: cosmos/integration/cli_bridge/capability_router.py (397 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: CLI Capability Router — Smart routing + fallback chains across CLI bridges.

"Route to the right brain. Free first, smart always." - The Collective

Features:
- Capability-based routing (web search → Gemini, code edit → Claude Code)
- Task signal detection from prompt keywords
- Fallback chains with

CLASSES:
- RoutingDecision: Result of routing logic.
- CLICapabilityRouter: Smart router that selects the best CLI bridge for each query.
